tasks.label: phcl-check-exchange-http
tasks.command: $ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/exchange' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "STATUS=$($r.StatusCode)"; $c=$r.Content; if($c.Length -gt 1200){$c.Substring(0,1200)} else {$c} } catch { Write-Host 'REQUEST_FAILED'; Write-Host $_.Exception.Message; if($_.Exception.Response){ $resp=$_.Exception.Response; Write-Host ("STATUS=" + [int]$resp.StatusCode); $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader($resp.GetResponseStream()); $body=$sr.ReadToEnd(); $sr.Close(); if($body.Length -gt 1200){$body.Substring(0,1200)} else {$body} } }

tasks.label: phcl-check-routes-status
tasks.command: curl.exe -i http://localhost:3000/; echo '---'; curl.exe -i http://localhost:3000/exchange; echo '---'; curl.exe -i http://localhost:3000/api/exchange/rates

tasks.label: phcl-port-3000-owner
tasks.command: netstat -ano | findstr :3000; $pid=(netstat -ano | findstr :3000 | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1); if($pid){ Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$pid" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List }

tasks.label: phcl-inspect-pids-3000
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=11092 OR ProcessId=1412" | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: phcl-inspect-pids-3000-lite
tasks.command: Get-Process -Id 11092,1412 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path, StartTime | Format-List

tasks.label: phcl-reset-port-3000
tasks.command: $ids = netstat -ano | Select-String ':3000' | ForEach-Object { ($_.ToString().Trim() -split '\s+')[-1] } | Where-Object { $_ -match '^[0-9]+$' } | Select-Object -Unique; foreach ($id in $ids) { Stop-Process -Id ([int]$id) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ('Stopped PIDs on :3000 -> ' + (($ids -join ', ')))

tasks.label: phcl-stop-stale-node
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'PHCL_Super|next/dist/bin/next|npm-cli.js' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Stopped stale Node processes for PHCL_Super.'

tasks.label: phcl-clean-next-cache
tasks.command: if (Test-Path '.next') { Remove-Item '.next' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Removed .next cache.' } else { Write-Host '.next not found.' }

tasks.label: phcl-http-code-check
tasks.command: curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/exchange; echo; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/; echo; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:3000/api/exchange/rates; echo
